meta.title: kairos, Inc. — Intervene at the kairos.
meta.description: kairos builds AI products that capture the decisive moments of your business.

hero.title: Intervene at the kairos.
hero.subtitle: kairos builds AI products that capture the decisive moments of your business.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Turn the moments that decide a sale into measurable revenue.
mission.body1: Visitors hesitate. They drop off. They give up on a purchase — and that single moment usually disappears before anyone sees it. As AI agents start operating sites on users' behalf, that blind spot is only growing.
mission.body2: kairos records, visualizes, and intervenes at those decisive moments. Instead of guessing what to change, your team sees exactly where outcomes are won or lost — and turns that insight into conversion, revenue, and a better user experience, repeatably.

products.label: Products
products.title: CVR optimization for the AI Agent era.

agentSignal.name: AgentSignal
agentSignal.tagline: A CVR optimization platform for the AI Agent era
agentSignal.description: Record and analyze the behavior of both users and AI agents, and intervene at the decisive moment.

recording.title: Session Recording + Heatmaps
recording.body: Record visitor behavior and visualize the moment of drop-off.

agentReplay.title: Agent Replay
agentReplay.body: Record how AI agents interact with your site. Optimize UX for the Agent era.

live.title: Live Co-browsing
live.body: Live screen share with operator-initiated push for in-the-moment intervention.

pushCV.title: Push CV Learning Loop
pushCV.body: An autonomous AI engine that delivers, measures, and learns to maximize conversions.
